name: agentic-dev-flow
description: Agentic development workflow plugins for intelligent task planning, dependency mapping, and knowledge management.

plugins.name: agentic-dev-flow
plugins.description: Core agentic workflow plugin for intelligent task planning, breakdown, and orchestration using sub-agents.

plugins.name: agentic-wiki
plugins.description: Knowledge system plugin for ingesting data, synthesizing structured knowledge, and enabling semantic querying across workflows.

skills.name: wiki
skills.description: Transform raw data into structured, queryable knowledge. Supports ingestion, synthesis, querying, cleanup, and knowledge expansion.
skills.usage: /wiki ingest | absorb [date-range] | query <question> | cleanup | breakdown | status

commands.name: ingest
commands.description: Normalize raw data into structured markdown entries with metadata.

commands.name: absorb
commands.description: Synthesize entries into coherent, context-rich wiki articles.

commands.name: query
commands.description: Answer questions using synthesized knowledge across the wiki.

commands.name: cleanup
commands.description: Improve article quality, structure, and internal linking.

commands.name: breakdown
commands.description: Detect gaps and generate new articles from patterns and references.

commands.name: status
commands.description: Display ingestion progress, coverage, and knowledge metrics.

principles: Synthesize meaning, not just store data
Ensure all data becomes usable knowledge
Favor depth and insight over volume
